name: Audit Trail
description: Reads permission-matrix and secrets-vault-plan contracts and designs a comprehensive audit trail system: events to log, structured JSON log format with tenant context fields, retention policy per event type, SIEM integration points, tamper-evident log storage design, and compliance report generation covering SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, and ISO 27001.

checks.fail: permission-matrix contract not available — cannot design audit trail without permission matrix

checks.pass: secrets-vault-plan contract available — proceeding with audit trail design
checks.fail: secrets-vault-plan contract not available — cannot design audit trail without secrets vault plan

checks.prompt: Using the permission-matrix and secrets-vault-plan contracts, design a comprehensive audit trail system for the multi-tenant platform: (1) enumerate all events to log: data access events (reads and writes to tenant data), permission-change events (role assignments, revocations), secret rotation events, tenant lifecycle operations (create, suspend, delete), admin actions, login/logout events, failed authorisation attempts, and API quota events, (2) define a structured JSON log format with mandatory fields: tenant_id, actor_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, timestamp (ISO 8601 with ms precision), source_ip, user_agent, request_id, session_id, and outcome (success/failure with reason), (3) retention policy per event category with specific retention durations (e.g. security and audit events 2 years, operational events 90 days, debug events 7 days) and archival strategy, (4) SIEM integration points — define the log shipping mechanism (e.g. structured syslog, Kafka, direct API), required normalisation fields, and correlation identifiers for SIEM rule authoring, (5) tamper-evident log storage design using append-only storage with cryptographic hash chaining (each log entry includes a hash of the previous entry), (6) describe how the audit log directly supports SOC 2 Type II evidence collection, GDPR Article 30 records of processing activity, and ISO 27001 Annex A.12.4 logging controls.
checks.pass: Audit trail design complete — event catalogue, log format, retention, SIEM integration, tamper-evidence, and compliance documentation produced
checks.fail: Audit trail design incomplete — missing SOC 2 events or retention policy
